sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this turn-based strategy game

special_mechanics.name: Rope Swing
special_mechanics.description: Worms can swing by rope when proper items are available

special_mechanics.name: Parachute
special_mechanics.description: Worms can deploy parachute when proper items are available

special_mechanics.name: Teleport
special_mechanics.description: Worms can teleport when proper items are available

special_mechanics.name: Bungee
special_mechanics.description: Worms can perform bungee jumps when proper items are available

special_mechanics.name: Knockback Damage
special_mechanics.description: Worms are knocked into the water or terrain when hit by weapons; health reduced based on weapon power and hit directness

tier_notes: Tier 2 classification appropriate: Worms Armageddon is a turn-based strategy game, not an action platformer. No precise movement physics values are documented in available sources. The game emphasizes weapon variety, destructible terrain, and turn-based tactical gameplay rather than character movement mechanics. Basic movement actions (walk, jump, rope swing, parachute, teleport, bungee) are described qualitatively but numerical physics parameters are not provided.
